title: NoSQL for modern apps and AI: The future of Memorystore, Firestore, and Bigtable
summary: Google Cloud presented advancements in three NoSQL database services: Memorystore, Firestore, and Bigtable. The session covered product releases, architectural innovations, customer stories, and roadmaps for supporting AI and agentic applications with high-performance, scalable data solutions.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech surveys recent developments across three of its NoSQL services: Memorystore, Firestore, and Bigtable. The session covers product releases, architectural changes, customer stories, and roadmaps oriented toward AI and agentic applications, with attention to high-performance and scalable data solutions. Concepts touched include vector search, prompt caching, and real-time databases, indicating how these services are being positioned to back modern app and AI workloads.
